title: Crash when the schema for sqlite_sequence is corrupt
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE fake_sequence(name VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, seq INTEGER);
UPDATE ob_tables SET sql=REPLACE(sql,'fake_','sqlite_'), name='sqlite_sequence' WHERE name='fake_sequence';
key_bug_features: Corrupted sqlite_sequence entry causes autoincrement table crash
